explanations.5: This specifies which pre-built Docker image to use; the version number (3.22.6_200219) tells Docker exactly which release of LimeSurvey to run.
explanations.22: This tells Docker not to start the LimeSurvey app until the database container reports it's healthy, preventing connection errors during startup.
explanations.33: This is a health check command that Docker runs periodically; it connects to MySQL and pings it to verify the database is actually responding and ready.
